title: McAfee ePO Endpoint Compliance Playbook v2
content:
Discover endpoints that are not using the latest McAfee AV signatures.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (epo, xsoar-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: ServiceNowCreateIncident, commentsToContext, epo-get-current-dat, epo-get-latest-dat, epo-update-client-dat.
raw_yaml:

version: -1
name: McAfee ePO Endpoint Compliance Playbook v2
description: Discover endpoints that are not using the latest McAfee AV signatures.

    task:

      version: -1
      name: Are any endpoints outdated and using an older DAT version?
      description: A comma-separated list of systems on which an out-of-date DAT file

      type: condition
      iscommand: false
      brand: ''
    nexttasks:
      'No':

      'Yes':
      - '11'
    scriptarguments:

        simple: '-1'

      description: A comma-separated list of systems on which an out-of-date DAT file

      iscommand: false
      brand: ''

        This script is used to wrap the generic create-record command in ServiceNow.
        You can add fields that you want to create the record with, as script arguments or in the
        code and work with the records easily.
      scriptName: ServiceNowCreateIncident
      type: regular
      iscommand: false
      brand: ServiceNow
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - '13'
    scriptarguments:
      description:
        simple: Out of date ePO endpoints to handle
      severity:
        simple: '3'

    view: "{\n  \"position\": {\n    \"x\": 598,\n    \"y\": 1063\n  }\n}"

      iscommand: false
      brand: ''
    nexttasks:

      entryId:

      listSeperator:
